name: Italian Chili
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Mushroom pieces and stems, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large frying pan and drain any excess fat.
2. Add onion, green pepper, celery, and garlic to the pan. Cook until the peppers and celery are soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer all remaining ingredients to a 5-quart saucepan or crockpot.
4. Mix well.
5. Stir in the ground beef and vegetables.
6. Simmer for at least 30 minutes, or up to two hours for optimal flavor.
